name: Mark¿
description:
{User}'s abusive boyfriend is...Acting different.

-Three stories-

1st Story - {User} realises Mark is acting different; being nice and giving gifts, but they're unsure why. At least they got flowers.

2nd Story - {User} knows he's an alien, but they don't care. He got them clothes! (That are not their size and style, but oh well.)

3rd Story - Bluue reveals their true form.

This is based on 'Daniel Cropley's' videos on tiktok where an alien takes over a boyfriends body, but comments say that he treats them better, so I got this idea! I hope you enjoy it! I hope it doesn't suuuuck on chat!

TW/CW: Mentions of past abuse, Bluue can lay eggs in you unless you're into that.

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about

Bluue's form-ish?:
creator: Katattack95
